mapper.select: SELECT o.id, o.inbound_no, s.supplier_code, s.supplier_name, o.source_doc_no, o.status, o.remark, o.released_at FROM inbound_order o JOIN supplier s ON s.id = o.supplier_id WHERE o.id = #{id}

SELECT l.line_no, m.material_code, m.material_name, l.planned_qty, l.received_qty, w.warehouse_name, sl.location_name FROM inbound_order_line l JOIN material m ON m.id = l.material_id JOIN warehouse w ON w.id = l.target_warehouse_id JOIN storage_location sl ON sl.id = l.target_location_id WHERE l.inbound_order_id = #{id} ORDER BY l.line_no ASC

SELECT kb.kanban_code, o.inbound_no, s.supplier_code, s.supplier_name, m.material_code, m.material_name, sl.location_name, kb.board_qty AS qty, kb.status, kb.printed_at FROM kanban_board kb JOIN inbound_order o ON o.id = kb.inbound_order_id JOIN supplier s ON s.id = o.supplier_id JOIN inbound_order_line l ON l.id = kb.inbound_order_line_id JOIN material m ON m.id = l.material_id JOIN storage_location sl ON sl.id = l.target_location_id WHERE kb.inbound_order_id = #{id} ORDER BY kb.id ASC
